    1. Rule()

Klasse Rule

java.lang.Object
io.quarkus.hibernate.orm.panache.PanacheEntityBase
io.quarkus.hibernate.orm.panache.PanacheEntity
at.jku.se.entity.Rule
@Entity public class Rule extends io.quarkus.hibernate.orm.panache.PanacheEntity
An IF-THEN automation rule evaluated by the rule engine (FR-10, FR-11). Supports three trigger types: time-based, threshold (sensor value), and event (state change).

  • Feldübersicht

    Felder
    Modifikator und Typ
    Feld
    Beschreibung
    Device
    actionDevice
    The device on which the rule's action is performed.
    String
    actionValue
    The value to apply to actionDevice when the rule fires.
    Boolean
    active
    Whether this rule is currently active.
    String
    name
    Human-readable name for the rule (e.g., "Motion activates hallway light").
    String
    triggerCondition
    Textual description or cron expression of the trigger condition.
    Device
    triggerDevice
    The device whose state or value is monitored for THRESHOLD and EVENT triggers.
    Double
    triggerThresholdValue
    The numeric value that triggers the rule for THRESHOLD type (e.g., temperature below 18.0 °C).
    TriggerType
    triggerType
    How the rule is triggered (FR-11).
    User
    user
    The user who owns this rule.

    Von Klasse geerbte Felder io.quarkus.hibernate.orm.panache.PanacheEntity

    id

  • Konstruktorübersicht

    Konstruktoren
    Konstruktor
    Beschreibung
    Rule()
    Creates an empty entity; fields are populated before persisting.

  • Methodenübersicht

    Von Klasse geerbte Methoden io.quarkus.hibernate.orm.panache.PanacheEntity

    toString

    Von Klasse geerbte Methoden io.quarkus.hibernate.orm.panache.PanacheEntityBase

    count, count, count, count, delete, delete, delete, delete, deleteAll, deleteById, find, find, find, find, find, find, findAll, findAll, findById, findById, findByIdOptional, findByIdOptional, findByIds, flush, getEntityManager, getSession, isPersistent, list, list, list, list, list, list, listAll, listAll, persist, persist, persist, persist, persistAndFlush, stream, stream, stream, stream, stream, stream, streamAll, streamAll, update, update, update

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, wait, wait, wait

  • Felddetails

    • name

      public String name
      Human-readable name for the rule (e.g., "Motion activates hallway light").

    • triggerType

      public TriggerType triggerType
      How the rule is triggered (FR-11).

    • triggerCondition

      public String triggerCondition
      Textual description or cron expression of the trigger condition. For TIME_BASED: a cron string. For others: a human-readable description.

    • triggerDevice

      public Device triggerDevice
      The device whose state or value is monitored for THRESHOLD and EVENT triggers. Null for TIME_BASED triggers.

    • triggerThresholdValue

      public Double triggerThresholdValue
      The numeric value that triggers the rule for THRESHOLD type (e.g., temperature below 18.0 °C). Null for other trigger types.

    • actionDevice

      public Device actionDevice
      The device on which the rule's action is performed.

    • actionValue

      public String actionValue
      The value to apply to actionDevice when the rule fires. Same string encoding as Schedule.actionValue.

    • active

      public Boolean active
      Whether this rule is currently active.

    • user

      public User user
      The user who owns this rule.

  • Konstruktordetails

    • Rule

      public Rule()
      Creates an empty entity; fields are populated before persisting.
